facebook.content:
"But if serving the Lord seems undesirable to you, then choose for yourselves this day whom you will serve... But as for me and my household, we will serve the Lord." - Joshua 24:15

This is not a choice to be taken lightly. Who you serve determines the kind of kingdom living you experience. Will you serve the things of this world or will you commit to serving the Lord?

What kingdom commitments are you making today?

What kingdom commitments are you making today?

Start your Kingdom journey

#IFM #IncreasingFaith #JesusIsLord
facebook.pullQuote: Who you serve determines the kind of kingdom living you experience.

instagram.content:
"He that dwelleth in the secret place of the most high shall abide under the shadow of the Almighty."

You can't let circumstances around you dictate your life. When the storms of life rise, it's time to go to the secret place and dwell in the shadow of the Almighty. What's the secret place for you today?
